subject: Add filebeat sidecar container for dmaap-dr
commit_message:
Add filebeat sidecar container for dmaap-dr

Change-Id: I3f81a683832ec37598e165c859944ab97a9ffc51
Issue-ID: DMAAP-853
Signed-off-by: econwar <conor.ward@est.tech>

Patch Set 3:

It is some time that DMaaP DR is failing for me in OpenLab env:
onap          aaa-dmaap-dbc-pg-0                                            1/1       Running            0          2h
onap          aaa-dmaap-dbc-pg-1                                            1/1       Running            0          2h
onap          aaa-dmaap-dbc-pgpool-8f46d6f54-4d4nj                          1/1       Running            0          2h
onap          aaa-dmaap-dbc-pgpool-8f46d6f54-m4g2h                          1/1       Running            0          2h
onap          aaa-dmaap-dmaap-bus-controller-74d7d5fb84-bz7sv               1/1       Running            0          2h
onap          aaa-dmaap-dmaap-dr-db-575f656c4-9vscz                         1/1       Running            1          2h
onap          aaa-dmaap-dmaap-dr-node-595c87c67c-d8tgw                      0/2       Init:0/1           13         2h
onap          aaa-dmaap-dmaap-dr-prov-5b59899bcb-drl89                      1/2       CrashLoopBackOff   33         2h


root@borislav-rancher-new:~# k logs -n onap          aaa-dmaap-dmaap-dr-prov-5b59899bcb-drl89 -c dmaap-dr-prov
this is LIB /opt/app/datartr/lib
this is ETC /opt/app/datartr/etc
Starting using /opt/app/datartr/lib/datarouter-prov-jar-with-dependencies.jar

root@borislav-rancher-new:~# k describe po -n onap          aaa-dmaap-dmaap-dr-prov-5b59899bcb-drl89

 > Normal   Pulled   55m (x25 over 2h)   kubelet, borislav-node-new-7 
 > Successfully pulled image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/dmaap/datarouter-prov:1.0.3"
 > Normal   Pulling  50m (x26 over 2h)   kubelet, borislav-node-new-7 
 > pulling image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/dmaap/datarouter-prov:1.0.3"
 > Warning  BackOff  52s (x703 over 2h)  kubelet, borislav-node-new-7 
 > Back-off restarting failed container

Yes we are having trouble with the mariadb not being instantiated correctly intermittently. For some reason the database and user aren't created, so then the datarouter-prov container fails to start correctly. We think it could be a timing issue but are not sure. Would it make sense to increase the times for the livenessProbe?
